stemHtml: In case of performance Class A aeroplane, why would you consider performing a derated thrust take-off on a contaminated runway?

options.a: There will be an additional safety margin, and maximum take-off power (TOGA) can be selected at any time during take-off.
options.b: New minimum control speeds can be established, which might lead to better take-off performance.
options.c: V<sub>MCG</sub> and V<sub>MCA</sub> will be equal, leading to better take-off performance.
options.d: V<sub>1</sub> can be lowered below V<sub>MCG</sub>, leading to better take-off performance.
